song_name: Twisters - Aint No Love In Oklahoma
version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/J6YlaeACE4E. Attempted to make a correction but it was denied. This version was played in DGCFAD tuning.

versions.song_name: Twisters - Aint No Love In Oklahoma
versions.version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/J6YlaeACE4E.

tuning: D G C F A D

pro_brother.song_name: Twisters - Aint No Love In Oklahoma

content:
In the recording, there is certainly an F note in the Cadd9, so you might play a Cadd4add9 or C/F.

[Chords]
[ch]D5[/ch]      xx023x
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]   x32033
[ch]G[/ch]       320033
[ch]Gsus2[/ch]   300033

[tab][Riff, repeats through whole song]
D|------------------------|------------------------|
A|------------------------|------------------------|
F|------------------------|------------------------|
C|-----------------7------|------------------------|
G|-8---------8/10b---10-8-|-8---------------3h5----|
D|---10-8-10--------------|---10-8-10---3h5--------| [/tab]

or can be played as

[tab]D|------------------------|------------------------|
A|------------------------|------------------------|
F|--------------2---------|------------------------|
C|-3-------3/5b---5-3-----|-3----------------------|
G|---5-3-5----------------|---3-5-3--------3h5-----|
D|------------------------|------------3h5---------| [/tab]

[Intro]
[ch]D5[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D5[/ch]
I keep chasin' that same old devil down the same old dead-end highway[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D5[/ch]
Ridin' that storm runnin' through my veins like a shot-down tail-spun airplane[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D5[/ch]
Scared of nothin' and I'm scared to death, I can't breathe then I catch my breath[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D5[/ch]
But I keep chasin' that same old devil down the same old dead-end highway[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
Ain't no love in Oklahoma, just the whistle of a long, black train[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
You'll know when it's comin' for you, ridin' in on the wind and rain[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D5[/ch]
I got saved in the same red river, the same red river tryna drown me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D5[/ch]
Ain't knockin' me down, I'm standin' my ground, with the whole world fallin' all around me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D5[/ch]
I keep runnin', but I'm standin' still, I pray for peace, but I need the thrill[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D5[/ch]
But I keep chasin' that same old devil down the same old dead-end highway[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Gsus2[/ch]   [ch]D5[/ch]
Ain't no love in Oklahoma, just the whistle of a long, black train[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
You'll know when it's comin' for you, ridin' in on the wind and rain[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]D5[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Gsus2[/ch]   [ch]D5[/ch]
Ain't no love in Oklahoma, just the whistle of a long, black train[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
You'll know when it's comin' for you, ridin' in on the wind and rain[/tab]

Ain't no love in Oklahoma, just the whistle of a long, black train[/tab]

p - pull off
h - hammer on
b - bend
/ - slide
